indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX condition_embeddings_condition_profile_id_model_content_has_key ON public.condition_embeddings USING btree (condition_profile_id, model, content_hash)
CREATE INDEX condition_embeddings_ivfflat_idx ON public.condition_embeddings USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists='25')
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX condition_embeddings_pkey ON public.condition_embeddings USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX knowledge_embeddings_ivfflat_idx ON public.knowledge_embeddings USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists='100')
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX knowledge_embeddings_knowledge_node_id_model_content_hash_key ON public.knowledge_embeddings USING btree (knowledge_node_id, model, content_hash)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX knowledge_embeddings_pkey ON public.knowledge_embeddings USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX resource_embeddings_chunk_id_model_content_hash_key ON public.resource_embeddings USING btree (chunk_id, model, content_hash)
CREATE INDEX resource_embeddings_ivfflat_idx ON public.resource_embeddings USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists='100')
CREATE INDEX resource_embeddings_metadata_idx ON public.resource_embeddings USING btree (organization, topic, audience)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX resource_embeddings_pkey ON public.resource_embeddings USING btree (id)
